sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60337" key="kteristh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτερ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60337.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">undertaker</tr_>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ταφῆες</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
